abstract.t: The Tactile Internet refers to a new communication and networking paradigm, which can provide low-latency, reliable and secure transmission for real-time information such as control, touch, and sensing/actuation in emerging tactile internet applications like teleoperation, immersive virtual reality,and haptics communications. The main goal of this document is: 1) to briefly introduce tactile internet background and typical applications; 2) to identify potential service requirements that can be addressed at the IETF or researched at the IRTF.
